overview: DemonZeno is a world-class trading education platform and official hub for the DMNZ meme token. It features a 5-tier Trading Academy (Beginner to Master) with 15-20 premium lessons per tier, interactive exercises, chart pattern diagrams, famous trader profiles, and a rigorous quiz system requiring a perfect 30/30 score for a prestigious certificate. Zeno AI (powered by Gemini) is embedded in every lesson for trading Q&A. All certificates are globally stored and displayed on a public Certificate Wall. The DMNZ token section covers the Full Fair Launch, roadmap, and how to buy via Blum Mini App.
features: 5-tier Trading Academy (Beginner to Master) with 15-20 lessons per tier
Premium lessons with real trade breakdowns, chart patterns, case studies, and DemonZeno quotes
Famous trader profiles: Jesse Livermore, Paul Tudor Jones, George Soros, Waqar Zaka
Rigorous 30-question MCQ quiz with 100+ question pool per tier — perfect 30/30 required
Anti-cheating measures: randomized answers, 45s timer, no answer reveal, IP fingerprint logging
Premium certificate image with 9-char unique ID, tier badge, DemonZeno watermark, QR code
Public Certificate Wall — searchable by ID, filterable by tier, with leaderboard
Zeno AI embedded in every lesson for trading Q&A (Gemini-powered, no off-topic)
Interactive exercises: spot the mistake, pattern recognition drills, risk calculator
Progress tracking: lesson streaks, weekly goals, comeback reminders, spaced repetition
Session-local Admin Dashboard with global certificate management and analytics
DMNZ token info with Full Fair Launch messaging, roadmap, and Blum Mini App buy guide
